Title: Display all equipment correctly
Test_Steps: 1. Open app; 2. Navigate to Equipment page
Expected_Result: All items visible with: name; category; status; location

Title: Empty state handling
Test_Steps: 1. Open app; 2. Navigate to Equipment page
Expected_Result: Shows "No equipment found" message + Add button visible

Title: Filter by single category
Preconditions: DB has items in Electronics; Mechanical; Books
Expected_Result: Only Electronics items shown; count matches DB

Title: Multi-category filter
Expected_Result: Items from both categories shown (OR logic)

Title: Status displays correctly
Expected_Result: Badges show: 🟢 Available; 🔴 Borrowed; 🟡 Maintenance

Title: Borrow available item — happy path
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow on Oscilloscope; 2. Enter borrower: "John Doe"; 3. Enter date: today; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Status → Borrowed; borrower shown; history record created

Title: Borrower name required — empty
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Leave name empty; 3. Enter valid date; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Error: "Borrower name required"; status unchanged

Title: Borrow date validation — past date
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Enter name: "Jane"; 3. Enter date: yesterday; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Error: "Borrow date cannot be in past"

Title: Borrow date validation — far future
Test_Steps: 1. Click Borrow; 2. Enter name: "Bob"; 3. Enter date: +1 year; 4. Confirm
Expected_Result: Warning or error: "Date too far in future"

Title: Borrow already borrowed item
Expected_Result: Borrow button disabled/hidden; shows "Borrowed by Alice"

Title: Borrow with special characters in name
Expected_Result: Accepted; name stored correctly

Title: Borrow with very long name
Expected_Result: Truncated or rejected with clear max-length error

Title: Return borrowed item — happy path
Expected_Result: Status → Available; borrower cleared; return timestamp recorded

Title: Return already available item
Expected_Result: Return button disabled/hidden; no action possible

Title: Double-return prevention
Expected_Result: Second click ignored; no duplicate history

Title: History shows complete timeline
Expected_Result: Chronological list with: equipment; borrower; borrow date; return date; status

Title: History filters by borrower
Expected_Result: Only John's records shown

Title: History filters by date range
Expected_Result: Only February records shown

Title: Active borrows marked correctly
Expected_Result: Active: "Currently Borrowed" badge; Returned: return date shown

Title: Search by equipment name
Expected_Result: "Oscilloscope" shown; "Multimeter" hidden

Title: Search by borrower name
Expected_Result: John's records shown

Title: Case-insensitive search
Expected_Result: Match found regardless of case

Title: Add valid new item
Test_Steps: 1. Click Add; 2. Name: "Function Generator"; 3. Category: Electronics; 4. Location: Lab A; 5. Save
Test_Data: Name: "Function Generator"; Cat: Electronics; Loc: Lab A
Expected_Result: Item appears in list; status = Available

Title: Required field validation — empty name
Test_Steps: 1. Leave Name empty; 2. Fill Category; Location; 3. Save
Expected_Result: Error: "Name required"; item not added

Title: Duplicate name handling
Expected_Result: Error: "Equipment already exists"

Title: Category persists across sessions
Test_Steps: 1. Add item with new category "Chemical"; 2. Refresh page
Expected_Result: "Chemical" appears in filter dropdown

Title: Keyboard navigation
Expected_Result: Logical tab order; focus visible; Enter activates buttons

Title: Responsive layout
Expected_Result: Table stacks horizontally; buttons remain accessible

Title: Full borrow→return→borrow cycle
Expected_Result: All 4 transitions work; history has 2 complete cycles

Title: Browser refresh preserves data
Expected_Result: "Scope" still shows Borrowed by John
